The same day it was cancelled @MrsErikaKirk showed up at the campus and complained about Unfuck America — Ironically in that same meeting Erika sc

“line goes up, therefore my president is good.”

this mix-up of "observer" meaning the same thing as "human conscious person watching something" drives me insane about this


bad_stats 🕜💵🖨️🕣 (@thebadstats)

A few months ago, Warren Smith hadn't heard about the  double slit experiment, but after watching some youtube videos about it, it really made him think. Then he even wrote about it in his book! Unfortunately, he seems fairly confused about it.

Good, there shouldn't be. Who the fuck cares what someone tweeted when they were 15? You people are a joke.

Not a SINGLE question for Mamdani at his press conference today about his wife using the N word and posting open support for Palestinian terrorism

Every reporter who was called on today should be ashamed

why is BE going to Cuba? Hasan is going to be 100% locked up in a hotel room in Curacao the entire time he's out of town pretending to be in Cuba lmaoooo


Charred American Troops (@NukedVeterans)

Landed in Cuba earlier today.

I'm here solely to *** Hasan Piker.





— https://nitter.net/NukedVeterans/status/2034867919302045735#m

From “flotilla” to “flytilla” lmaoooooo this mf gonna go to a country experiencing a blackout and humanitarian crisis and stream for two days in a fully air conditioned room wearing a $5,000 outfit with reliable power????

Video

The underlying claim by Clinton is absolutely true. He tried harder than almost anyone to move both sides to a peaceful agreement, but Arafat wasn't interested. The entire Arab world shook their head in disbelief when he walked away from the discussions.


Mehdi Hasan (@mehdirhasan)

Liar. 

Epstein Class member.

Video

This might be the most unpopular war in decades and the pitch is still basically “trust us.”

well, prior to this bombshell I was fairly supportive of Mamdani, despite him being to the left of me on a lot of issues, but after seeing this, I'm gonna have to say I am majorly supportive of him

No real answer, no transparency, no trust.


Taylor Lorenz (@TaylorLorenz)

All of this is literally disclosed *in my announcement*. Jesus christ. Dozens of journalists have done this fellowship, but somehow you only have issues with me. That is revealing!



— https://nitter.net/TaylorLorenz/status/2034302515752423508#m
